sub_modules.fp_hp_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM containing the public 31-tap high-pass FIR coefficient list, returning zero for unused tap indices.
sub_modules.fp_float_mul_comb: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision multiply model using float-to-real and real-to-float conversion for simulation accuracy.
sub_modules.fp_float_add_comb: Combinational IEEE-754 single-precision add model using float-to-real and real-to-float conversion for simulation accuracy.
